task.title: Set Up a Local Project Folder

context.p: Before cloning the course repository, you need a dedicated folder on your computer to store all course files. Keeping everything in one place avoids confusion later.

step.cmd: Open your file manager (Windows Explorer or macOS Finder).
Navigate to your Documents folder (or any location you prefer).
Create a new folder and name it my-learnings.

info.note: Avoid spaces in folder names. Hyphens and underscores are safe alternatives.

step.cmd: In VS Code, go to FileOpen Folder and select the my-learnings folder.

result.p: VS Code now shows the my-learnings folder in its Explorer panel. This is your working directory for the course.
